ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "index" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "DateTime" TEXT /* Date and time of the data point */,
  "Open" REAL /* Opening price for the period */,
  "Close" REAL /* Closing price for the period */,
  "High" REAL /* Highest price during the period */,
  "Low" REAL /* Lowest price during the period */,
  "Volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades during the period */,
  "Previous_Close" REAL /* Closing price from the previous period */,
  "Timestamp" TEXT /* Unique timestamp for the data point */,
  "Volume_weighted_avg_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price during the period */,
  "Number_of_transactions" INTEGER /* Number of transactions during the period */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data point */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the instrument */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the financial instrument */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the financial instrument */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the instrument */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the instrument details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_instruments_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("exchange") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the exchange is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set up the alert */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument the alert is for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price change, volume spike) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, pending) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Last time the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "widgets" TEXT /* List of widgets included in the dashboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dashboard was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the dashboard was updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the dashboard is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument the report is for */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, custom) */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the generated report */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the report is archived */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users with whom the report is shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent used to perform the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument the prediction is for */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the instrument */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version used for the prediction */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the prediction */,
  "prediction_source" TEXT /* Source of the prediction (e.g., AI model, manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("model_version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the AI model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the model version was released */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics for the model version */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of AI model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "training_data_set" TEXT /* ID or reference of the training data set used */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was trained */,
  "validation_metrics" TEXT /* Validation metrics of the model */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the model version is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_version_id")
)
